title: chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. pallidum
intro: Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. pallidum, also known as the pale daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in treating various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. pallidum are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
